title: GCA Member Access Brief 001
subtitle: Purchase-and-hold eligibility, 30-day review, and reserve-funded member benefit boundaries.
scope: Member Access Brief 001 is a ready-for-review content brief for the 2026-05-23 public content slot. It explains the planned GCA Member eligibility rule, the 30-day holding-period evidence requirement, the one-time 10,000 GCA member benefit review, and the current release boundary. It is not live self-service claiming, not financial advice, not a buy or sell recommendation, and not a promise of approval.

memberRule.requirement: Purchase and continuously hold at least 1,000,000 GCA for 30 consecutive days before member benefit review.
memberRule.memberBenefitSource: project or owner-held reserve transfer only; no new minting
memberRule.registeredUserLimit: one member benefit review per registered user
memberRule.walletLimit: one verified Base wallet per registered user
memberRule.currentPublicStatus: rules published; public self-service claiming is not live

reviewFlow.step: Register through the official GCA member intake when controlled intake is available.
Verify one Base Mainnet wallet with read-only ERC-20 balance checks.
Provide public transaction evidence for the holding-period start.
Maintain at least 1,000,000 GCA for 30 consecutive days.
Support and ledger review must approve the record before any 10,000 GCA member benefit transfer.

releaseBoundaries: The public website currently publishes the rules, preview pages, and manual review schema.
Public self-service claiming is not live until controlled HTTPS account UI and release gates are complete.
Holding 1,000,000 GCA does not automatically trigger a transfer.
The 10,000 GCA member benefit is planned as a reserve-funded transfer after review, not new minting.
Member status does not activate live trading, custody, withdrawals, leverage, or risk-control bypass.

xEnglish: GCA Member Access Brief 001 is ready for review.
Planned GCA Member rule: purchase and continuously hold 1,000,000 GCA for 30 days before review eligibility.
The planned one-time member benefit is 10,000 GCA after support and ledger approval, funded from reserve only. No new minting. Not self-service yet.
xChinese: GCA Member Access Brief 001 已准备好审核。
计划中的 GCA Member 规则：购买并连续持有 1,000,000 GCA 满 30 天，才进入审核资格。
计划中的一次性会员权益为 10,000 GCA，必须经过客服和账本审核后由储备转账，不增发，目前不是自助领取。
telegram: GCA Member Access Brief 001 is ready for operator review.

The planned member rule requires 1,000,000 GCA held for 30 consecutive days before review eligibility. The planned 10,000 GCA member benefit requires support and ledger approval and must come from reserve only.
Public self-service claiming is not live yet. Verify official links first: https://gcagochina.com/member-access-brief-001.html

safeClaims: GCA has published a planned GCA Member access rule.
The planned rule requires 1,000,000 GCA held for 30 consecutive days before member benefit review eligibility.
The planned one-time member benefit amount is 10,000 GCA after support and ledger approval.
The planned member benefit must come from project or owner-held reserve transfer only, not new minting.
Public self-service claiming is not live yet.
doNotClaim: the 10,000 GCA member benefit is self-service claimable today
holding 1,000,000 GCA automatically triggers a transfer
approval is promised before support and ledger review
the member benefit is newly minted
the member benefit is cash, income, reimbursement, trading permission, voting control, or a way to bypass risk controls
member status creates live trading access before release gates are complete
